The '''Kobothi S-Corps''' was an elite unit of security forces charged with the protection of [[Kobothi Space]] and interests. It was formed sometime after the [[Mavvan Conflict]].
S-Corps members knew a few [[code language]]s known only to the Kobothi S-Corps.

{{Military-stub}}
